description_long: This is a medium-sized, boxy backpack with a structured form and a matte brown finish, featuring a large front flap secured by a strap and buckle. The front pocket is prominent, with a circular wooden button and a small lock, and there are two additional side pockets with flap closures. The back panel and shoulder straps are made of a textured, gray fabric, providing comfort and support. A small oval badge with the red letters 'HG' is visible on the upper front flap, serving as a subtle decorative element. The overall design is utilitarian, with reinforced edges and a practical, urban aesthetic suitable for daily use.
description: A structured brown backpack with a front flap, side pockets, and gray fabric straps, featuring a small 'HG' badge on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main flap with 'HG' badge, large front pocket with buckle and lock, and both side pockets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side pocket with flap and the thickness of the backpack, as well as the attachment of the shoulder straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the gray, textured back panel and both shoulder straps, with no pockets or flaps visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side pocket and strap attachment, with the main flap partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: An oval badge with red 'HG' letters is located on the upper front flap, small in size and centered.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, gray fabric shoulder straps with a black reinforcement at the top, no visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One large main compartment under the top flap, one large front pocket with a buckle and lock, and two side pockets with flap closures.
attribute_decorative_elements: An oval badge with 'HG' in red on the front flap; no other visible decorative elements.
